name: Flying Financial Service Holdings Limited
summary: Flying Financial Service Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of financial services to property developers and real estate development activities in the People's Republic of China. It operates through four segments: Investment in Property Development Projects; Operation of Financial Services Platform; Provision of Entrusted Loan, Pawn Loan, Other Loan Services, and Financial Consultation Services; and Finance Lease Services. The company offers short-term and long-term loans and financial consultation services to borrowers and financial institutions. It also provides long-term finance lease services; investment income services; and operates a financial services platform. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
